message:
feat(daemon): Add NoopDaemonClient and improve DaemonFallbackEmbedder error handling

Adds NoopDaemonClient as a placeholder when daemon config is missing, allowing
graceful fallback without configuration errors. Improves the fallback embedder
and reranker to track failure metadata (attempts, backoff state) for better
diagnostics.

Changes:
- Add NoopDaemonClient stub that returns Unavailable for all operations
- Add DaemonFailure struct to capture failure context
- Improve try_embed() to return structured failure info
- Code formatting improvements (rustfmt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
